title: pseudolysimachion kiusianum var. japonicum
intro: Pseudolysimachion kiusianum var. japonicum, also known as Japanese whitlow grass, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Pseudolysimachion kiusianum var. japonicum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments.
